# MCP Pointer extension provenance

- Source: https://github.com/etsd-tech/mcp-pointer
- Upstream release/commit: `0.6.0` / `59601d17ed63176e994f82d20558c386272cad4f`
- License: MIT; see `LICENSE`
- Build: `pnpm install --ignore-scripts && pnpm build` (esbuild) from a quarantined clone
- Reviewed: 2026-07-11 using the project MCP-vetting procedure

This directory contains generated browser-extension artifacts retained from the local
implementation. `tools/dev-browser.sh` loads them only when the directory exists, or loads an
explicit unpacked extension supplied through `CLICK_BRIDGE_EXTENSION`.
